summary: Comprehensive test suite with good multi-level coverage (unit, integration, end-to-end via act). Strengths: proper mocking of license lookups, clear TDD methodology with Red-Green comments, act-driven harness validates CI execution, good error path testing (missing files, invalid JSON). Gaps: summaryAsserts.ts has no direct unit tests, some CLI validation edge cases untested (non-string versions in manifest, missing policy/licenses files), YAML parsing assertions are fragile (regex-based), and test data shows repetition (policy defined multiple times). The act integration is well-designed and would catch deployment regressions, but unit coverage misses some helper functions and boundary conditions.
